Who We Are

Crafting Iconic Spaces Across the UAE

T&Z Golden Building Construction LLC brings a proven track record from Russia and Azerbaijan to Dubai. With 10+ years delivering government and large-scale projects across Moscow and Baku, we now bring that same expertise to the UAE.

New to Dubai but far from new to excellence — every project carries our signature commitment to quality, precision, and client satisfaction backed by a government-recognized track record.

50+Completed Projects
10+Years Experience
30+Skilled Professionals
100%Licensed & Insured
What We Do

Our Core Services

End-to-end construction solutions tailored to your vision.

01

Villa Renovation

Complete transformation of residential villas — structural, interior, and exterior.

02

Interior Fit-Out

Premium fit-out for residential and commercial spaces — flooring, ceilings, joinery, and luxury finishes.

03

New Construction

Full-cycle new build projects from foundation to finishing — residential, commercial, and mixed-use.

04

MEP Works

Mechanical, electrical, and plumbing installations meeting all Dubai municipality standards.

05

Project Management

Dedicated project managers ensuring timelines, quality control, and seamless coordination.

06

Maintenance & Repair

Ongoing maintenance contracts and one-off repair services keeping your property in perfect condition.

Why Choose Us

The T&Z Golden Difference

We don't just construct buildings — we build lasting relationships through transparency, craftsmanship, and results that exceed expectations.

  • Licensed & Fully Compliant

    Fully registered with Dubai Municipality and all relevant UAE authorities.

  • On Time, Every Time

    Strict deadline adherence without compromising quality.

  • Premium Materials Only

    Only the finest materials from certified suppliers.

  • Transparent Pricing

    No hidden costs. What we quote is what you pay.

  • Post-Completion Support

    Dedicated after-service support and maintenance packages.

Recognition

Government-Certified Excellence

The company's work in Moscow has been officially recognized by the Government of Moscow, acknowledging its professionalism and significant personal contribution to major public construction projects.

Experience trusted by government institutions. Now bringing the same unyielding standards to Dubai.

Certificate — English Translation
GOVERNMENT OF MOSCOW
Department of Construction of the City of Moscow
APPRECIATION
is hereby awarded to
Teymur Hasan Ogly Agaragimov
For high professionalism, conscientious work and significant personal contribution to the construction of educational facilities in the city of Moscow
Head of the Department
R. R. Zagrutdinov  ·  Moscow 2021
